changelog: Live update checking: the bug icon now polls for updates every 60 seconds and flips to 'Apply Fixes' in real time when a new version is pushed. After applying fixes, you can choose 'Restart Only' or 'Restart + Restore Progress' — the latter saves your Upload window's treeview (file names, CBY numbers, declaration numbers, statuses) to a temp file and restores it after restart, so you don't lose captured data during a live bug fix. The temp file expires after 5 minutes and can only be used once, so old data never reappears on future sessions. Works offline — periodic check silently fails when no internet.
